# comfyui_vidu_extend_video_node (Resource)

Extend an existing video by generating additional frames. [api node/video/Vidu]



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `model` (String) Input: COMFY_DYNAMICCOMBO_V3
- `prompt` (String) Input: STRING default:
- `seed` (Number) Input: INT default: 1
- `video` (String) Input: VIDEO (link)

### Optional

- `end_frame` (String) Input: IMAGE (link)

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier for this node instance
- `node_id` (String) ComfyUI node class type
- `video_output` (String) Output: VIDEO (slot 0)
